analysis: The project currently has a basic HTML structure with some CSS and JavaScript files. The theme is not yet implemented, and there are no specific black hole-related animations or visual elements. The CSS file contains some SVG patterns, but they are not properly formatted. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functionality.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure SVG data URLs are properly formatted for black hole patterns.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
